scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:pqrxyz801@sibtel.bbg.gv.at>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] To: <sip:pqrxyz801@sibtel.bbg.gv.at> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sips:8881100018@135.123.133.220:58438>;q=1;expires=3600;+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:c62d0e4a-501a-48c8-ab70-1138cd24035d>";reg-id=1;+av.sip.iptolerance;+av.sip.sig=4;avaya-actions="presence.initiate-pubsub, presence.redirect" Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 1800 User-Agent: pqrxyz Content-Length: 0
